strengths: All three required test cases present and faithful to the plan: full confirm flow (service.test.ts:973-1045), cancel flow (service.test.ts:1047-1094), history preserved (service.test.ts:1096-1146)
Confirm test satisfies the DELIVERABLE emphasis: pipeline re-run asserted via getColumns(42) and executeCard() (service.test.ts:1042-1043), not just the deletes

Correct fake-timer discipline: useFakeTimers -> runAllTimersAsync -> useRealTimers balanced in the two tests with fire-and-forget pipeline; cancel test correctly omits fake timers since it has no async pipeline; matches established runPipeline describe-block conventions
Cancel flow verifies absence of mutations (updateBoard/deleteOutputsForBoard not called) plus presence of cancellation message via regex /cancel|batal/i
All 58 tests in the file pass

issues.description: The 'conversation history preserved' test asserts only insertConversation.toHaveBeenCalled(), which does not actually verify history preservation. It never asserts that the existing turns survive (e.g., that deleteOutputs/deleteCards leave agent_conversations untouched) — a stronger assertion would check the pre-existing history is not deleted. Faithful to the plan snippet, so non-blocking.
